iot.topicrule.locationaction.CfnAbout: Describes an action to send device location updates from an MQTT message to an Amazon Location tracker resource.

iot.topicrule.locationaction.DeviceId.Description: The unique ID of the device providing the location data.

iot.topicrule.locationaction.Latitude.Description: A string that evaluates to a double value that represents the latitude of the device's location.

iot.topicrule.locationaction.Longitude.Description: A string that evaluates to a double value that represents the longitude of the device's location.

iot.topicrule.locationaction.RoleArn.Description: The IAM role that grants permission to write to the Amazon Location resource.

iot.topicrule.locationaction.Timestamp.Description: The time that the location data was sampled. The default value is the time the MQTT message was processed.

iot.topicrule.locationaction.TrackerName.Description: The name of the tracker resource in Amazon Location in which the location is updated.
